description: Finishing move that causes damage per combo point and converts each extra point of energy into 4.0999999 additional damage. Damage is increased by your attack power. 1 point : 259-292 damage 2 points: 428-461 damage 3 points: 597-630 damage 4 points: 766-799 damage 5 points: 935-968 damage
name: Ferocious Bite
